evidence_ranges.purpose: header scan for Japanese-language labels and JP/PMJP product codes across all sheet columns
2026 monthly payment amounts for Japanese-language candidate columns
spot check for semantic review candidates outside the JP/PMJP and explicit Japanese-language range
formula evidence that K is the primary Japanese group total over L:BY in sampled daily rows

evidence_ranges.range: SupermetricsQueries!A1:BA120 and top ranges of sampled related tabs

classification_method.primary_group_total: Include column K where row 7 is total and row 8 is 일본어; sampled daily formula K127 is =sum(L127:BY127).
classification_method.outside_group_rule: Add non-total columns outside L:BY when row 7 has a JP/PMJP product code or the visible header explicitly contains 일본어/Japanese.
classification_method.duplicate_rule: Exclude other total columns outside K to avoid double counting subgroup totals and their child columns.
classification_method.exclusion_rule: Exclude broad 일본-related non-language ETC products such as 일본 구매대행 because the question asks for 일본어 courses.

semantic_completeness.reason: The current calculation uses sheet hierarchy, JP/PMJP local codes, and explicit Japanese-language labels. It does not yet run a complete course-name semantic classifier over all columns.
accepted_evidence_tiers: K primary 일본어 hierarchy total over L:BY
non-total JP/PMJP local product codes outside L:BY

local_domain_overrides.impact: Include 류스펜나-labeled products as Japanese-language courses even when the code is ETC or the visible label does not include 일본어.

semantic_completeness.review_required_policy: Course names that appear to teach Japanese but do not have JP/PMJP codes or explicit 일본어/Japanese labels should be reviewed with local domain mappings before final semantic acceptance.

spot_checked_review_candidates.label: [프로모션] 류스펜나 코스프레 일본어 Zero 디지털 학습지 (올인원)
[프로모션] 류스펜나 코스프레 일본어 Zero 디지털 학습지

result.local_domain_override_impact: No change to the current total: QY 류스펜나 total is excluded only to avoid double counting its already-included JP child columns, XY/XZ are already included by PMJP code, and BNU ETC083 has zero 2026 amount in the checked range.

notes: ROAS, 광고비, ad spend, spend, and cost were not found in inspected workbook evidence.
Observed 광고 text was coupon/product text, not advertising cost evidence.
SupermetricsQueries inspected range exposed instruction/header rows but no query rows with metrics or ad-spend fields.
